headline: Stocks pare losses as oil falls back below $100; Dow is down 300 points: Live updates
summary: The Dow recorded its worst week since President Trump unveiled his tariff policy in April.

headline: BlackRock Fund Stress Tests Private Credit Liquidity And Transparency Assumptions
summary: BlackRock has imposed withdrawal limits on its flagship HPS Corporate Lending Fund after record redemption requests. The fund is experiencing heightened stress alongside a major loan writedown in its private lending portfolio. These steps have amplified concerns around liquidity, systemic risk, and transparency in the private credit market. For shareholders of BlackRock (NYSE:BLK), this fund stress arrives as the stock trades around $955.45, with a return of 61.5% over 3 years and 50.4%...

headline: BlackRock warns investing in the S&P 500 isn’t enough for retirement. They recommend a strategy that prioritizes income
summary: “There needs to be an evolution away from this being indexed only.”
